title: Ananthanarayana's Feature Selection Process
description: A flowchart illustrating V. S. Ananthanarayana's feature selection method for machine learning, which uses a hierarchical clustering approach to select the most relevant and non-redundant features.
elements: Select Representative Feature from Each Cluster
relationships: Process starts with the Raw Feature Set, which is used to Compute Pairwise Similarity Matrix, leading to Apply Hierarchical Clustering, which results in Form Feature Clusters, from which we Select Representative Feature from Each Cluster to finally output the Reduced Optimal Feature Subset
